titles.title: Amazing Grace Has Done It All

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v1 v4 v5 v1

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Found my Amazing Grace How could I deserve a gift so great My life is forever changed Blessed, He's now fills my soul Amazing Grace Has done it all

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Let me tell you about my Lord How he opened my heart's door Stepping in He said, My freedom now is yours

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I'm the one that paid it all The Lord had said, sin is no more yours Now you're free to live a life In abundance by my side

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Amazing Grace has led me to The revealed End Time Word So I make it through This dark evil world

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: What a joy it is to see I'm in the Word, the Word's in me I know what I'm destined for Amazing Grace wholly be whole
